stemHtml: Solo navigation to Freetown. You enter frequency 112.25 on the radio. What has happened?

options.a: The correct Tower frequency has been entered.
options.b: A radio frequency was entered but it contacts Ground, not Tower.
options.c: 112.25 is a VOR frequency that cannot be selected on the VHF comm radio.
options.d: 112.25 is an obsolete 25 kHz frequency needing conversion to 8.33 kHz.
